business.name: Westlake Coffee
business.subtitle: Diner & Coffee Shop
business.tagline: A Daly City diner — breakfast, lunch, and dinner, family-run on Junipero Serra.
business.parking_note: Free parking in the plaza lot — pull right in.

todays_special: Today: Country-fried steak with two eggs & hash — $14.95

what_we_serve.title: Breakfast
what_we_serve.blurb: Two eggs any style, fluffy pancakes, chorizo skillets, French toast and a real cup of coffee.

what_we_serve.title: Lunch
what_we_serve.blurb: Burgers on the griddle, club sandwiches, soup-and-salad, and our patty melt regulars come in for.

what_we_serve.title: Dinner
what_we_serve.blurb: Comfort plates — meatloaf, roast chicken, pasta, fish & chips — Thursday through Sunday evenings.

family_story.heading: A neighborhood diner, run by a family.
family_story.body: Westlake Coffee has been the corner where Daly City regulars start their day for years. We're family-owned and operated — that means the person taking your order in the morning is the same person checking the eggs on the griddle, and probably the same person who'll remember how you like your coffee next time. Pull up a stool at the counter, grab a booth with the kids, or stop in for a quick pastry on your way over the hill. We're glad you're here.
